scripts.install:all: npm install && cd datagent && npm install && cd ../datagent_ui && npm install && cd ../python_automation/frontend && npm install && cd ../../r-automation-nextjs/frontend && npm install && cd ../../sql_automation/frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgRed.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgGray.bold" --names "DATAGENT,REACT,BACKEND,EXCEL,PYTHON-B,R-B,SQL-B,PYTHON-F,R-F,SQL-F" "npm run start:datagent" "npm run start:react" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:excel" "npm run start:python-backend" "npm run start:r-backend" "npm run start:sql-backend" "npm run start:python-frontend" "npm run start:r-frontend" "npm run start:sql-frontend"
